title: What I do
summary: description: Deliver structured feedback on new activities from get_new_activities. Covers the full debrief format (what was good, what to improve, plan fit, next session) plus stream analysis rules for HR decoupling, power curve, zone distribution, cadence flags, and nutrition signals. Load for every new-activity review at startup or mid-session.

claims.text: description: Deliver structured feedback on new activities from get_new_activities.

Covers the full debrief format (what was good, what to improve, plan fit, next session) plus stream analysis rules for HR decoupling, power curve, zone distribution, cadence flags, and nutrition signals.
Load for every new-activity review at startup or mid-session.
## What I do Deliver structured, data-driven feedback on each unreviewed activity.
